_meta.status: DRAFT — contents pending clinical-lead confirmation (raised at #58 sign-off 2026-06-25)
_meta.purpose: INTERIM mitigation for the keyword-detection fails-open finding (issue #65). Used ONLY to suppress the #58 banned-opener rewrite (pass the reply through unchanged) when the turn looks sensitive but the keyword clinical-flag did not fire. It is deliberately broader than the CF-001..006 corpora and is allowed to over-match — a false match only costs a soft opener passing through, which Decision 2 established as the acceptable direction.
_meta.scope_guard: This lexicon does NOT set clinical_flags, does NOT drive the 24h clinician-review escalation, and does NOT affect crisis routing. It gates the opener rewrite only. The real fix for detection/escalation is the semantic tier in #65; do not let this lexicon be mistaken for it.
_meta.match: case-insensitive substring against the user message (English) plus the candidate reply

trauma_indicator: happened to me when i was
when i was a kid he
when i was a kid she
